title: Senior Software Engineer - LG Soft India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - LG Soft India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
LG Soft India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LG Soft India:
LG Soft India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Soft India!
